requirement_topic.zh: GEMS最低能效——家用制冷器具
requirement_topic.zht: GEMS最低能效——家用製冷器具

summary.en: Household refrigerators and freezers supplied in Australia are regulated under the Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012 and the Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (Household Refrigerating Appliances) Determination 2019. The mandatory obligation is compliance with the GEMS Act and the Determination before supply. The Determination references AS/NZS 4474:2018 for energy labelling and minimum energy performance standards requirements, and AS/NZS IEC 62552.1/.2/.3:2018 for test methods. Covered products include household refrigerating appliances in AS/NZS 4474:2018 product groups and can include appliances used in a commercial context if ordinarily supplied for household use.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的家用电冰箱和冷冻箱受《温室气体与能源最低标准法2012》及《温室气体与能源最低标准（家用制冷器具）决定2019》监管。强制性义务是供应前符合GEMS法及该决定。该决定引用AS/NZS 4474:2018作为能效标签和最低能效要求，并引用AS/NZS IEC 62552.1/.2/.3:2018作为试验方法。覆盖产品包括AS/NZS 4474:2018产品组内的家用制冷器具；若通常按家用供应，即使在商业场景使用也可能被覆盖。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的家用電冰箱和冷凍箱受《溫室氣體與能源最低標準法2012》及《溫室氣體與能源最低標準（家用製冷器具）決定2019》監管。強制性義務是供應前符合GEMS法及該決定。該決定引用AS/NZS 4474:2018作為能效標籤和最低能效要求，並引用AS/NZS IEC 62552.1/.2/.3:2018作為試驗方法。覆蓋產品包括AS/NZS 4474:2018產品組內的家用製冷器具；若通常按家用供應，即使在商業場景使用也可能被覆蓋。

standards_or_laws: Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012 — mandatory Australian framework for regulated product supply
Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (Household Refrigerating Appliances) Determination 2019 — mandatory product-specific GEMS determination
AS/NZS 4474:2018 — Household refrigerating appliances — Energy labelling and minimum energy performance standards requirements (referenced by the Determination)
AS/NZS IEC 62552.1:2018, AS/NZS IEC 62552.2:2018, AS/NZS IEC 62552.3:2018 — referenced test methods

summary.en: China's common domestic energy route is GB 12021.2-2015 for minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators, together with the China Energy Label system. GB 12021.2 is mandatory for China domestic sale, but it uses China's grade framework and test/reporting basis, not the Australian GEMS Determination and AS/NZS 4474 framework.
summary.zh: 中国境内常见能效路径为GB 12021.2-2015《家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级》及中国能效标识制度。GB 12021.2对中国境内销售为强制性要求，但其采用中国能效等级和测试/申报基础，并非澳大利亚GEMS决定和AS/NZS 4474框架。
summary.zht: 中國境內常見能效路徑為GB 12021.2-2015《家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級》及中國能效標識制度。GB 12021.2對中國境內銷售為強制性要求，但其採用中國能效等級和測試/申報基礎，並非澳洲GEMS決定和AS/NZS 4474框架。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators
China Energy Label system — domestic energy efficiency label framework

gap.en: A China Grade 1 or Grade 2 energy result does not prove Australian GEMS compliance. Exporters need model-specific testing and calculations aligned to AS/NZS 4474:2018 and AS/NZS IEC 62552:2018 as referenced by the 2019 Determination, including MEPS and product performance requirements such as pull-down, storage, defrost recovery, automatic controls, and circumvention-device checks where applicable.
gap.zh: 中国1级或2级能效结果不能证明符合澳大利亚GEMS。出口商需要按2019决定引用的AS/NZS 4474:2018和AS/NZS IEC 62552:2018进行型号级测试和计算，包括最低能效及适用的拉温、储藏、除霜恢复、自动控制和规避装置检查等产品性能要求。
gap.zht: 中國1級或2級能效結果不能證明符合澳洲GEMS。出口商需要按2019決定引用的AS/NZS 4474:2018和AS/NZS IEC 62552:2018進行型號級測試和計算，包括最低能效及適用的拉溫、儲藏、除霜恢復、自動控制和規避裝置檢查等產品性能要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with the GEMS Act 2012 and the Household Refrigerating Appliances Determination 2019 is required before covered models are supplied in Australia; AS/NZS 4474:2018 and AS/NZS IEC 62552:2018 are referenced technical standards under the Determination
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 and China Energy Label obligations apply before sale in China

source.publisher: Energy Rating / Australian Government E3 Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Australian GEMS MEPS must be assessed under the Australian Determination and referenced AS/NZS methods. Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades are useful engineering inputs only; they do not substitute for Australian GEMS evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】澳大利亚GEMS最低能效须按澳大利亚决定及其引用的AS/NZS方法评估。中国GB 12021.2能效等级只能作为工程输入，不能替代澳大利亚GEMS证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】澳洲GEMS最低能效須按澳洲決定及其引用的AS/NZS方法評估。中國GB 12021.2能效等級只能作為工程輸入，不能替代澳洲GEMS證據。
